title: Results: 2nd Annual Michel "Kiki" Bohémier Memorial Fiddle Contest
excerpt: The results are in for the 2nd Annual Michel "Kiki" Bohémier Memorial Fiddle Contest held in Lorette, Manitoba. With seven different categories there was lots of opportunity and many great...
bodyHtml:
The results are in for the 2nd Annual Michel "Kiki" Bohémier Memorial Fiddle Contest held in Lorette, Manitoba. With seven different categories there was lots of opportunity and many great performances. Congratulations to all the winners! Click Read More to see the details...
9 years and under - Old Time Fiddling
1. Cabrel St. Vincent
2. Jett Emerson
3. Caleb Dorge

10 to 13 years- Old Time Fiddling
1. Tim Veldhuis
2. Miguel Sorin
3. Robert Boulet

14 to 17 years - Old Time Fiddling
1.Emily Green
2. Stephanie Reimer
3. Sylvie Reimer

60+ years - Old Time Fiddling
1. Henri Hince
2. Ed Weslak
3. Bob Kuzak

Open Championship - Old Time Fiddling
1. Émilie Chartier
2. Alex Lamoureux
3. Jany Cory
4. Kaitlyn Obedzinski

16 years and under - Metis Style Fiddling
1. Miguel Sorin
2. Robert Boulet

17 years and over - Metis Style Fiddling
1. Alex Lamoureux
2. Randy Weslak
3. Jane Cory
